$comment: Claude Code MANAGED settings — baked to /etc/claude-code/managed-settings.json. These are the highest-precedence settings and cannot be overridden by user/project settings. Defense-in-depth against ACCIDENTAL agent actions. The agent user has NO sudo, no Docker, and no git remote credentials (so it can't push/alter remotes); these rules mainly prevent wasted attempts and accidents. See SECURITY.md.
